description: Revamp IntuitionGameScreen.kt UI to match the web frontend style - add background image, sound effects (correct/wrong), floating item animations with images, countdown bar, and purple-themed styling. DO NOT change any ViewModel calls or game logic.
steps: Step 1: Read the current IntuitionGameScreen.kt to understand the existing structure and ViewModel interactions that MUST remain unchanged.

Step 2: Revamp the UI of IntuitionGameScreen.kt with these changes: (a) Add GameBackground composable with URL 'https://mystical-nusa.web.id/images/asset/games/background/intuition-background.jpg' as full-screen background behind the Scaffold. (b) Replace the Scaffold topBar background with transparent/semi-transparent dark. (c) Change accent color from MysticGold to IntuitionPurple (#b149f7) throughout this screen. (d) Add a countdown timer bar (LinearProgressIndicator with purple gradient) that counts down 10 seconds per round - purely visual, does not affect game logic. (e) Keep item images using AsyncImage (already implemented) but add a floating animation effect (animate offset Y with infinite transition). (f) Add SoundManager.playSound calls: on correct answer play 'https://mystical-nusa.web.id/sound/sfx/correct-intuition.wav', on wrong answer play 'https://mystical-nusa.web.id/sound/sfx/wrong.mp3'. Place these after the answerRound call succeeds and lastAnswerCorrect is known. (g) Start BGM when screen enters composition using LaunchedEffect: SoundManager.playBgm(context, 'https://mystical-nusa.web.id/sound/bgm/default.mp3'). Stop on DisposableEffect onDispose.

Step 3: Ensure ALL existing ViewModel interactions remain: viewModel.startGame(), viewModel.answerRound(id), uiState collection, and all state-driven UI branches (pre-game, playing, complete) remain functionally the same.
Step 4: Verify the item cards still show AsyncImage with the existing URL construction logic for item.image.
acceptance_criteria: IntuitionGameScreen.kt displays a background image loaded from the remote URL
Purple theme color (#b149f7) is used for accents instead of gold
Sound effects play on correct/wrong answers
BGM starts on screen entry and stops on exit
A countdown timer bar is shown during gameplay rounds
All ViewModel function calls remain identical to before
Item images still load via AsyncImage with the same URL logic
verification: Read IntuitionGameScreen.kt and verify ViewModel calls are unchanged
Verify SoundManager usage is present for correct/wrong sounds
Verify GameBackground composable is used with correct URL
